# Your World Painting

> Professional painting company serving Buffalo, NY and Western New York. Free estimates. Call 716-815-0333.

Your World Painting is owned and operated by Malik, a fully insured painting professional based in Buffalo, NY. The company serves homeowners across Buffalo and Western New York with interior painting, exterior painting, accent walls, cabinet refinishing, and deck staining.

## Services

- **Interior Painting** — walls, ceilings, trim, hallways, bedrooms, bathrooms, full rooms
- **Exterior Painting** — house siding, doors, porches, fascia, shutters
- **Accent Walls** — feature walls, chalkboard walls, bold color statements
- **Cabinet Refinishing** — kitchen and bathroom cabinet painting and refinishing
- **Deck Staining** — deck and porch staining, sealing, and restoration

## Contact & Service Area

- Phone: 716-815-0333
- Email: yourworldpainting@gmail.com
- Primary market: Buffalo, NY
- Service area: Buffalo, Cheektowaga, Amherst, Tonawanda, Williamsville, Lancaster, West Seneca, Orchard Park, Hamburg, Lackawanna (Western New York / Erie County)

## About

Malik is a local Buffalo painter known for clean work, reliable scheduling, and fair pricing. Your World Painting is fully insured and offers free estimates on all jobs.

## Get a Free Estimate

Visit https://yourworldpainting.com or call 716-815-0333.
